lines.speaker: Bedabin Nomad Fighter
lines.text: Hello Effendi! How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Bedabin Nomad Fighter
lines.text: This is the camp of the Bedabin. Talk to our leader, Al Shabim, he'll be happy to chat.

lines.speaker: Bedabin Nomad Fighter
lines.text: It is north-east of here effendi, across the trackless desert. It will be a thirsty trip!
